    Technical source data

    MissionTypes:FTnXLOVBJEOeutHvbkV1nw

    labelA New Beginning: Part 11 (0-0)
    titleA New Beginning: Part 11
    majorTypestatic
    descriptionLieutenant Kreiger: “I don’t think there’s much left for someone like you to do around here. There’s a warp gate in the northeastern corner of Hyperion. The Warp Gate provides a fast way to travel between systems and without a Warp Gate it would take about two years to reach the closest neighbouring system. The Antor Federation actually built most of the warp gates, although it was during the golden era, more than 500 years have past since then end of that age.”
    maxLvl0
    keyFTnXLOVBJEOeutHvbkV1nw
    tableMissionTypes
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionLieutenant Kreiger: “It was a pleasant surprise to encounter a captain as capable as you, I wish you the best of luck in your future adventures.”
    addedBodies["tsKIlfSL9EG0CgVY3A5f_A"]
    availableYes
